name: Tall Ceramic Organic Modern Vase - Threshold™: Hand Wash, Tabletop Decor, Watertight Bottle Vase
description:
Spruce up your tabletop arrangement with this Tall Ceramic Organic Modern Vase from Threshold™. This modern vase made from ceramic in a cream organic finish features a tiered cylindrical silhouette for a unique look that goes well with any decor. This watertight vase looks great as a standalone piece or filled with a bunch of flowers or green foliage. Place it on your mantelpiece, console table or side table in your living room, entryway or bedroom with other accent pieces, and hand wash for easy care.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
